confirmation.detail: inbox envelope env_46f541ef-015d-4e82-8630-8078e6972204 read back as received

payload.impact: A client-service Site cannot complete a safe clarification draft through the canonical path even though the charter produced one valid draft_reply action. Operators are forced either to bypass Narada or leave the work blocked.
payload.proposed_direction: Dearbitrate whether safe clarification draft_reply actions should bypass content uncertainty approval, or add a governed operator action that approves a pending foreman decision and materializes its proposed outbound command. Existing approve-draft-for-send is too late because it requires an outbound command that does not yet exist.
payload.summary: During Staccato email-marketing onboarding, a safe missing-information draft_reply for Willem Driessen's underspecified campaign request was repeatedly converted to a pending_approval foreman decision because Kimi emitted content-uncertainty flags. Narada has draft approval operators only after an outbound command exists, but no governed operator path to approve a pending foreman decision into an outbound draft.
payload.title: Pending-approval clarification drafts lack a materialization path
